changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql:
insert into form_flow_definition ( form_flow_definition_key, form_flow_definition_version, start_step, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, migration_definition_key ) select distinct * from ( select distinct ffd.form_flow_definition_key || '-' || ffd.form_flow_definition_version as form_flow_definition_key, ffi.form_flow_definition_version, ffd.start_step , jsd.case_definition_key, jsd.case_definition_version_tag, ffd.form_flow_definition_key as migration_definition_key from form_flow_instance ffi join json_schema_document jsd on (additional_properties->>'documentId')::uuid = jsd.json_schema_document_id join form_flow_definition ffd on ffi.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key and ffi.form_flow_definition_version = ffd.form_flow_definition_version
union all
select distinct ffd.form_flow_definition_key || '-' || ffd.form_flow_definition_version as form_flow_definition_key, ffd.form_flow_definition_version as form_flow_definition_version, ffd.start_step, pdcd.case_definition_key, pdcd.case_definition_version_tag, ffd.form_flow_definition_key as migration_definition_key from process_link pl join form_flow_definition ffd on ( ( split_part(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 2) != 'latest' and split_part(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 2)::int = ffd.form_flow_definition_version ) or ( split_part(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 2) = 'latest' and ffd.form_flow_definition_version = ( select max(form_flow_definition_version) from form_flow_definition ffd2 where ffd2.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key ) ) ) and split_part(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 1) = ffd.form_flow_definition_key join act_re_procdef pd on pd.id_ = pl.process_definition_id join process_definition_case_definition pdcd on pdcd.process_definition_id = pd.id_ where pl.form_flow_definition_key is not null ) as all_definition_to_migrate

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql:
insert into form_flow_definition ( form_flow_definition_key, form_flow_definition_version, start_step, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, migration_definition_key ) select distinct * from ( select distinct concat(ffd.form_flow_definition_key, '-', ffd.form_flow_definition_version) as form_flow_definition_key, ffi.form_flow_definition_version, ffd.start_step , jsd.case_definition_key, jsd.case_definition_version_tag, ffd.form_flow_definition_key as migration_definition_key from form_flow_instance ffi join json_schema_document jsd on UUID_TO_BIN(additional_properties ->> '$.documentId') = jsd.json_schema_document_id join form_flow_definition ffd on ffi.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key and ffi.form_flow_definition_version = ffd.form_flow_definition_version
union all
select distinct concat(ffd.form_flow_definition_key, '-', ffd.form_flow_definition_version) as form_flow_definition_key, ffd.form_flow_definition_version as form_flow_definition_version, ffd.start_step, pdcd.case_definition_key, pdcd.case_definition_version_tag, ffd.form_flow_definition_key as migration_definition_key from process_link pl join form_flow_definition ffd on ( ( SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', -1) != 'latest' and CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', -1) as UNSIGNED) = ffd.form_flow_definition_version ) or ( SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', -1) = 'latest' and ffd.form_flow_definition_version = ( select max(form_flow_definition_version) from form_flow_definition ffd2 where ffd2.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key ) ) ) and SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 1) = ffd.form_flow_definition_key join act_re_procdef pd on pd.id_ = pl.process_definition_id join process_definition_case_definition pdcd on pdcd.process_definition_id = pd.id_ where pl.form_flow_definition_key is not null ) as all_definition_to_migrate

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_flow_step ( form_flow_step_key, form_flow_definition_key, form_flow_definition_version, next_steps, on_open, on_complete, type, on_back, title, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag ) select ffs.form_flow_step_key, ffd2.form_flow_definition_key, ffs.form_flow_definition_version, ffs.next_steps, ffs.on_open, ffs.on_complete, ffs.type, ffs.on_back, ffs.title, ffd2.case_definition_key, ffd2.case_definition_version_tag from form_flow_step ffs join form_flow_definition ffd on ffd.form_flow_definition_key = ffs.form_flow_definition_key and ffd.form_flow_definition_version = ffs.form_flow_definition_version join form_flow_definition ffd2 on ffd2.migration_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key and ffd2.form_flow_definition_version = ffd.form_flow_definition_version

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update form_flow_instance ffi set case_definition_key = jsd.case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag = jsd.case_definition_version_tag, form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key from json_schema_document jsd join form_flow_instance ffi2 on (additional_properties->>'documentId')::uuid = jsd.json_schema_document_id join form_flow_definition ffd on ffi2.form_flow_definition_version = ffd.form_flow_definition_version and ffi2.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.migration_definition_key and ffd.case_definition_key = jsd.case_definition_key and ffd.case_definition_version_tag = jsd.case_definition_version_tag where ffi.form_flow_instance_id = ffi2.form_flow_instance_id

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update form_flow_instance ffi join json_schema_document jsd on UUID_TO_BIN(ffi.additional_properties->>'$.documentId') = jsd.json_schema_document_id join form_flow_definition ffd on ffi.form_flow_definition_version = ffd.form_flow_definition_version and ffi.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.migration_definition_key and ffd.case_definition_key = jsd.case_definition_key and ffd.case_definition_version_tag = jsd.case_definition_version_tag set ffi.case_definition_key = jsd.case_definition_key, ffi.case_definition_version_tag = jsd.case_definition_version_tag, ffi.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update process_link pl set form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key || '-' || ffd.form_flow_definition_version from process_link pl2 join form_flow_definition ffd on ( ( split_part(pl2.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 2) != 'latest' and split_part(pl2.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 2)::int = ffd.form_flow_definition_version ) or ( split_part(pl2.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 2) = 'latest' and ffd.form_flow_definition_version = ( select max(form_flow_definition_version) from form_flow_definition ffd2 where ffd2.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key ) ) ) and split_part(pl2.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 1) = ffd.form_flow_definition_key where pl.id = pl2.id

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update process_link pl join form_flow_definition ffd on ( ( SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', -1) != 'latest' and CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', -1) as UNSIGNED) = ffd.form_flow_definition_version ) or ( SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', -1) = 'latest' and ffd.form_flow_definition_version = ( select max(form_flow_definition_version) from form_flow_definition ffd2 where ffd2.form_flow_definition_key = ffd.form_flow_definition_key ) ) ) and SUBSTRING_INDEX(pl.form_flow_definition_key, ':', 1) = ffd.form_flow_definition_key set pl.form_flow_definition_key = concat(ffd.form_flow_definition_key, '-', ffd.form_flow_definition_version)

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: delete from form_flow_step where case_definition_key is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: delete from form_flow_definition where case_definition_key is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition ( id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag ) select gen_random_uuid() as id, forms.* from ( select distinct fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, ffs.case_definition_key, ffs.case_definition_version_tag from form_flow_step ffs join form_io_form_definition fd on fd.name = ffs.type->'properties'->>'definition' where ffs.type->>'name' = 'form' and not exists ( select 1 from form_io_form_definition fd2 where fd.name = fd2.name and ffs.case_definition_key = fd2.case_definition_key and ffs.case_definition_version_tag = fd2.case_definition_version_tag ) ) as forms

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition ( id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag ) select UUID_TO_BIN(UUID()) as id, forms.* from ( select distinct fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, ffs.case_definition_key, ffs.case_definition_version_tag from form_flow_step ffs join form_io_form_definition fd on fd.name = ffs.type->>'$.properties.definition' where ffs.type->>'$.name' = 'form' and not exists ( select * from form_io_form_definition fd2 where fd.name = fd2.name and fd.case_definition_key = fd2.case_definition_key and fd.case_definition_version_tag = fd2.case_definition_version_tag ) ) as forms
